generator.title: Concept Art Generator
generator.subtitle: Configure your creative direction and generate production-ready concept art.

prompt.label: Additional Prompt
prompt.placeholder: Describe key subjects, mood, lighting, or composition details...

preview.label: Preview
preview.empty: Your generated artwork will appear here.
preview.loadingDescription: Optimizing your prompt with Gemini and generating assets via Pollinations AI.
preview.errorDescription: Please check your input values and try again.
preview.successFooter: Generation complete. View in your Gallery.
preview.errorFooter: Generation failed. Click retry to try again.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Explore your collection of AI-generated assets and concepts.
gallery.mySubtitle: A personalized space containing your AI-generated gaming assets and creations.
gallery.signInDescription: Please log in with Google to view and manage your generated concept art.
gallery.mySignInDescription: You must be logged in to view your personalized asset generation gallery.
gallery.emptyDescription: Generate your first artwork to build your personal gallery.
gallery.myEmptyDescription: Get started by returning to the generator home page and creating your first custom studio asset.

about.intro1AfterBrand: is an AI-powered concept art platform built for game creators. It helps developers, designers, and artists transform structured ideas into visually compelling concept art within seconds.
about.intro2: Instead of writing complex prompts manually, creators simply describe their world through intuitive inputs like game genre, environment, art style, inspiration, and additional details. Midgard Studios refines these ideas into optimized AI prompts, making concept creation faster, more consistent, and easier to iterate.
about.why1AfterBrand: comes from Norse mythology, where it represents the realm of humans-a world filled with stories, exploration, creativity, and adventure.
about.why2BeforeBrand: Just as Midgard connects countless journeys and legends,
about.why2AfterBrand: is designed as a creative space where ideas evolve into immersive game worlds through the power of AI.
about.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to rapidly create, refine and organize game concept art.

aiConcept.title: AI Concept Art Generation
aiConcept.description: Transform structured ideas into high-quality game concept art using AI-powered prompt generation.

personalGallery.title: Personal Gallery
personalGallery.description: Every generated artwork is securely stored, allowing you to revisit, organize, and continue building your game world.

promptRegeneration.title: Prompt Regeneration
promptRegeneration.description: Iterate on previous concepts by editing existing prompts instead of starting over from scratch.

builtForCreators.title: Built for Game Creators
builtForCreators.description: Designed specifically for game developers, artists, and indie studios with a structured creative workflow.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your Midgard Studios account.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to generate assets and access your gallery
auth.secureNotice: Authorized access only. By continuing, you agree to our Terms.
